title: stipa gracilis
intro: Stipa gracilis, also known as blue oat grass, is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Stipa gracilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
